commit.message:
Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)
- pages/7: Stock Analysis (any ticker, MAs, volatility, company info)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Annual Budget tool (1-year P&L with monthly breakdown)

- Sales forecast, direct costs, overheads by category
- Monthly P&L table with FY totals and % of revenue
- KPI cards: Revenue, Gross Profit, Overheads, EBITDA
- 4 charts: Revenue vs Costs, Monthly EBITDA, Overhead breakdown, Cumulative EBITDA
- Excel template download + upload
- PDF export with branded report

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: 5-year financial model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Overhaul story quality: semantic clustering, aggressive noise filter, better prompts

CLUSTERING (the big one):
- Replace 0.55 word-overlap clustering with question-stem matching
- Markets only cluster if they're the SAME question at different
  thresholds (e.g. "deport 250k" + "deport 500k")
- "Trump tariffs" and "Trump impeachment" no longer merge just
  because they share "trump"
- New _question_stem() strips numbers, dates, dollar amounts,
  question words to find the invariant core of each market name

NOISE FILTER:
- Add _is_noise_market() multi-pass filter with financial rescue
- Pass 1: Combo/parlay detection — "yes X,yes Y" format = sports parlay
- Pass 2: Sports entity + outcome language (expanded SPORTS keyword list)
- Pass 3: Esports/gaming (Counter-Strike, Valorant, LoL, etc.)
- Pass 4: Crypto daily price noise ("BTC above $72k by end of day")
- Pass 5: Generic noise (weather, reality TV, social media)
- Financial rescue: markets with earnings/IPO/acquisition keywords
  survive even if they mention sports entities
- Tested against 15 real production market names: 15/15 correct

EDITORIAL QUALITY:
- Rewrite Claude system prompt: event-first headlines, no filler
- Improve individual story + cluster prompts for sharper output
- Suppress uncategorized "OTHER" stories below score 50
- Radar only shows OTHER if volume ≥ $500K
- Expanded SPORTS keywords: +60 entries (esports, NCAA, racing, etc.)

RESULT (on production data):
- Stories: 13 → 3 (10 noise markets removed, all signal kept)
- Radar: 20 → 14 (6 noise markets removed, clean feed)

TESTS: 27 passing (added 13 new tests for clustering + noise filter)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve convection model, add recovery stats and tooltips

- Replace adjacent-pair convection with buoyancy zone merge
- Add recovery stats row: Recirculation Loss, Net Rheem Recovery, Recovery ETA
- Add Tip component with tooltips on all dashboard stats and sliders
- Add test for buoyancy zone merge energy conservation

commit.message:
fix: pass session_token instead of session_jwt in browser deep-link

Stytch session_jwt expires in ~5 minutes, causing 401 errors in the
Electron browser. Switch to session_token (opaque, 7-day lifetime)
so the desktop app can exchange it for fresh JWTs via the Stytch API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve drag-and-drop reorder to use closest sibling detection

Replace DOM walk-up drop target finding with distance-based closest
sibling calculation, making drops more reliable when cursor is between nodes.

  no report_logs ao receber email.delivered / email.bounced / email.complained

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(fonts): change Instrument Serif font-display from optional to swap

font-display: optional causes the browser to permanently skip the font
if it isn't cached within ~100ms, resulting in Georgia fallback on first
visit. Combined with the preload hints added in 81faceb, swap ensures
the font always renders with minimal FOUT.

- Chat: Slack facts injected as external context, system prompt updated
- Frontend: Slack Sync template menu, channel picker, connected card with fact display
- Cron: hourly channel sync + 5-min notification sender via Vercel crons
- CSS: Full Slack card styling with Slack purple/green theme

commit.message:
fix: Prevent tour from auto-closing due to click bleed-through

The modal backdrop was immediately receiving a click event from the
previous interaction (e.g. clicking Activate on the Plugins page),
causing the tour to open and close in the same frame.

Fixed by tracking when the modal opened (tourOpenedAt timestamp) and
ignoring backdrop clicks that arrive within 400 ms of opening.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip token-refresh interceptor for auth endpoints

When a wrong password or unknown email was entered, the axios 401
interceptor was treating the login failure like a session expiry —
it tried to call /auth/refresh (which failed with 'No refresh token'),
then executed window.location.href = '/login', causing a hard page
reload instead of showing the field-level error message.

Fix: add an isAuthRoute guard so any 401 from /auth/* (login, register,
refresh) is passed straight through to the caller, letting the LoginPage
catch and display it normally.

fix(earnings): sort all sections by EW analyst interest, not surprise magnitude

always included regardless of beat/miss magnitude.

commit.message:
feat(network): add VLAN 10 for dedicated DNS interfaces

Network changes:
- Add VLAN 10 (bond0.10) to xsvr1 and xsvr2
- Configure with DHCP initially for Firewalla registration
- Remove secondary DNS IPs from bond0 (moving to VLAN approach)

VLAN 10 will be used for isolated DNS traffic with different MAC
presentation to Firewalla. After DHCP registration, will convert to
static IPs (172.18.10.10 for xsvr1, 172.19.10.20 for xsvr2) and add
firewall restrictions.

This replaces the bond0 secondary IP approach which had MAC address
conflicts with Firewalla's device tracking.
